description: I am a passionate tutor with expertise in Math and Programming. I have been tutoring for 5 years and have helped many students achieve their academic goals. I am patient, understanding, and dedicated to providing the best learning experience for my students.

ratings.comment: Luka is an amazing tutor! He explained the concepts clearly and helped me understand difficult topics in Math.
Luka is a fantastic tutor. He is patient and knowledgeable, and he always goes the extra mile to help his students succeed.

description: I am an experienced tutor specializing in English and History. I have a strong background in literature and historical studies, and I enjoy helping students improve their writing and critical thinking skills. I am committed to creating a supportive and engaging learning environment for my students.

ratings.comment: Anna was an excellent tutor! She explained the concepts clearly and helped me improve my writing skills.
Anna is a great tutor. She is patient and knowledgeable, but I wish she had more examples during the sessions.
